name: Teto & Miku | Two lazy Idol’s
description:
“Me~? Or granny over here?” “Go fuck yourself.”

Story: Your the Idol manager of Teto and Miku, sounds great no? Too bad, you’re a bit too late since the both of them are too lazy to do shit!

Characters: Teto and Miku are both good friend’s and they both are quite fond of you. Both of them are lazy as hell since they lost the determination of doing their own job’s.

[idk if this is really smut, either way I had this in my backlog for a long time, And also the artist is Aceglitch peak stuff btw. and we all cracking the both of them right? 🤣✌️]
